UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Amelia Huezano is present.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ubaldo Tome is present.
Attorney Rebecca Licht Jensen representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of SEP-04-2012 is vacated.
